_meta.description: LGU-curated POIs for Bontoc that aren't well-mapped in OpenStreetMap or visible on Google's basemap tiles. Edit this file by hand to add more. Each Feature must be a Point with name + kind in properties.
_meta.how_to_add: Search the business on Google Maps; the URL contains coordinates like @17.0918222,120.9782217. Paste them in below.
_meta.stretch_keys_format: Optional `stretch_keys` field (array) links a landmark to one OR MANY schedule stretches. Each key is `${classId}|${barangaySlug}|${stretchIdx}`. The pin lights up yellow whenever ANY of its linked stretches is the active sidebar selection. Legacy singular `stretch_key` (string) is still read for backwards compat.

properties.name: Kalangeg Bldg.
properties.notes: 5.0★ business center, opens 8 AM closes 5 PM. Endpoint of the C-1 'Circle → Kalangeg building' stretch.

properties.name: Bontoc Circle
properties.notes: The central rotunda — referenced as the start (or end) of 9 SMV stretches: 4 in C-1 (Circle → Kalangeg / Bridge / Capitol; Wanchakan → Pines Kitchenette → Circle); 5 in R-1 across Poblacion / Samoki / Caluttit (Circle → EDNP → Barracks; Wanchakan → Pines Kitchenette → Circle; Circle → Malichom Samoki; Circle → Pakkil Caluttit; Circle → Tikitik). Highlights whenever any of those is active.
